title: Pokemon Statue - 4G Legendary
description: [Vanilla+] Add giant statue of Alpha Pokemon ( Starters & Legendary from 4G )
body:
Pokemon statues added with this pack :

![APS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a47e1a488de8c00625bc3a127d1b1365c723ae_0.webp)

- Starters with their arenas
- Palkia and Dialga raised Spear Pillar into the sky with some very good loot
- Giratina arrives from the Deep Dark
